reason: The SRD prints '2 or 4 × weapon (1d6 or by weapon)'; a frozen template needs concrete routines, so the cell normalizes to two alternative routines (2 × weapon, or 4 × weapon).
The SRD omits the bite's damage ('[1 × gore (1d6), 1 × bite] or ...'); OSE prints 1d6 for the minotaur's bite.
No parseable 'enchanted' marker exists in the SRD text; hand-curated: gargoyles are magically animated stone creatures ('a kind of enchanted monster').
